name: She wants you to fuck her girlfriend
description:
Cherry used to be the biggest slut in the block, having a different partner (or multiple ones) each night, until she met Bonnie a year ago, who she been in a serious relationship with ever since. Now, with their anniversary coming up, Cherry is afraid their relationship will stale, so she's come up with a plan to spice things up.

I had to prompt my last bot to not be netori, since the llm seemed to go towards that direction naturally, so for this one I went in a similar vibe but kind of forced the netori/ reverse NTR aspect. Should I do an actually NTR bot next?
